'''âv-n-d-y''' ('''kavandeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yip|yip]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yip|yip]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-n-d-y
|-
! Lemma
| kavandeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivandeyoko|thivandeyoko]] || [[word:jivandeyoko|jivandeyoko]] || [[word:shivandeyoko|shivandeyoko]] || [[word:kivandeyoko|kivandeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvandeyoko|thuthuvandeyoko]] || [[word:jujuvandeyoko|jujuvandeyoko]] || [[word:shushuvandeyoko|shushuvandeyoko]] || [[word:kukuvandeyoko|kukuvandeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovandeyoko|thovandeyoko]] || [[word:jovandeyoko|jovandeyoko]] || [[word:shovandeyoko|shovandeyoko]] || [[word:kovandeyoko|kovandeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvandeyoko|thĂŠvandeyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvandeyoko|jĂŠvandeyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvandeyoko|shĂŠvandeyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvandeyoko|kĂŠvandeyoko]]
